name: frontend
description: The monorepo's central frontend surface - the project's models run live in pimas. First surface: the electronics wall (drag the assumptions, speculate the wall, watch the real model recompute).

scripts.test: node --test src/model.test.ts src/launch-economics.test.ts src/power-budget.test.ts src/probe-sim.test.ts src/mission.test.ts src/multi-probe.test.ts src/swarm.test.ts src/coordination.test.ts src/sources.test.ts src/spine.test.ts src/papers.test.ts
scripts.test:diff: node scripts/gen-diff.mjs && cd ../closure-sim && uv run python ../frontend/scripts/diff_check.py
